block_00: Aapke address ke pramaan ki samay seema samaapt ho gayi hai
block_02: Kripya dhyaan den ki aapke address ke pramaan ki samay seema samaapt ho gayi hai. Iska matlab hai ki ab aap humare saath trade ya jama nahin kar payenge.
block_03: Haalanki yadi aap humare saath trade karna jaari rakhna chaahte hain, to kripya apne account me nivaas ke pramaan ke rup me nimnalikhit dastaavejon me se koi ek upload karen:
block_04: Upyogita bill (Bijli, phone, paani, internet, aadi);
block_05: Aapke bank account ke sambandh me bank statement ya patra;
block_06: Aapke Tax praadhikaran se tax bil;
block_07: Aapki nagar paalika se muharaband nivaas pramaan patra.
block_08: Upload kiye jaane vaale dastaveej me aapka pura naam, pata, logo ya company/bank/nagar paalika ki muhar aur jaari karne ki tarikh (6 mahine se adhik purani nahin) honi chahiyen.
block_09: kripya dastaavej ki keval purn ya aadhe prishth ki pratiyaan pradaan karen (kaate gaye ya dhundhale dastaavej svikaar nahin kiye jayenge).
block_10: Hum is maamale me aapke sahyog ki saraahna karte hain aur aapke liye uplabdh rahte hain.
block_15: Yadi aapke paas koi prashna hai to humari
block_17: ko aapki madad karne me khushi hogi.
